title: Best Western India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Best Western India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Best Western India in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Best Western India:
Best Western India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Best Western India!
